/usr/bin/clang++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/MediCore.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MediCore.dir/src/core/Admin.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MediCore.dir/src/core/Appointment.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MediCore.dir/src/core/Bill.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MediCore.dir/src/core/Doctor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MediCore.dir/src/core/FileHandler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MediCore.dir/src/core/Patient.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MediCore.dir/src/core/Person.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MediCore.dir/src/core/Prescription.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MediCore.dir/src/core/Validator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MediCore.dir/src/exceptions/FileNotFoundException.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MediCore.dir/src/exceptions/HospitalException.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MediCore.dir/src/exceptions/InsufficientFundsException.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MediCore.dir/src/exceptions/InvalidInputException.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MediCore.dir/src/exceptions/SlotUnavailableException.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MediCore.dir/src/ui/AdminMenu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MediCore.dir/src/ui/DoctorMenu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MediCore.dir/src/ui/GUI.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MediCore.dir/src/ui/LoginScreen.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MediCore.dir/src/ui/PatientMenu.cpp.o -o MediCore  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/libsfml-graphics.3.0.2.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libsfml-window.3.0.2.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libsfml-system.3.0.2.dylib
